name: daily-expense-tests
description: 每日记账 - 测试工程根配置（三端测试编排）

scripts.test: npm run test:backend & npm run test:frontend & npm run test:uniapp & wait
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../uniapp && npm install
scripts.test:report: echo '报告已输出到 008.项目测试(测试工程师)/测试报告/'
